title: manilkara obovata
intro: Manilkara obovata, also known as the "white momba tree" or "umbrella tree", is a species of evergreen tree native to tropical Africa. The bark and leaves of the Manilkara obovata plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Manilkara obovata include teas, infusions, and decoctions made from the bark and leaves, which are used to treat various health conditions.
